summary: Completed comprehensive testing of backend refactoring fixes. All reported issues have been verified and one critical bug was fixed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly after fix.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - teamMembers.map is not a function error. API returns {team: {...}, members: [...]} but code expected array directly

passed_tests: Login flow works correctly
Dashboard loads without errors
Logo text is 'RED OPS' (all caps) - VERIFIED
Logo has pulse animation - VERIFIED
Announcement banner is visible and scrolling with text 'Welcome to RED OPS! This banner should be moving' - VERIFIED
Command Center page loads categories and my-requests without errors
Teams page loads and allows viewing team details (after fix)
Workflows page loads and shows 6 workflows
Workflow Editor opens without errors when clicking on a workflow
Categories page loads L1 and L2 categories correctly
GET /api/categories/l1 returns list of L1 categories
GET /api/categories/l2 returns list of L2 categories
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns dashboard statistics
GET /api/dashboard/editor returns 403 for Admin (expected - Admin cannot pick orders)
GET /api/dashboard/requester returns 403 for Admin (expected - Admin is not Requester)
GET /api/ratings/my-stats returns rating statistics
GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns unread count
GET /api/notifications returns list of notifications
GET /api/my-requests returns list of user's requests
GET /api/teams returns list of teams
GET /api/teams/{id}/members returns team with members array
GET /api/workflows returns list of workflows
GET /api/announcement-ticker returns active announcement
critical_code_review_comments: Teams.js line 97: API response structure mismatch - FIXED by extracting members array from response object
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring is complete and all routes are working. Fixed Teams.js to properly extract members array from API response. All reported issues (Command Center, Teams, Workflows, Workflow Editor, Categories, Announcement Banner, Logo) have been verified as working. The /api/dashboard/editor and /api/dashboard/requester endpoints return 403 for Admin user which is expected behavior since Admin role cannot pick orders and is not a Requester.

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: MOCKED - OTP delivery is logged to console instead of sent via real service

features_verified.teams_page: WORKING (after fix) - loads teams and team members
features_verified.workflow_editor: WORKING - visual canvas with nodes and connections
features_verified.categories_page: WORKING - shows L1 and L2 categories
features_verified.announcement_banner: WORKING - visible and scrolling with correct message

bug_fixed.issue: Teams page runtime error: teamMembers.map is not a function
bug_fixed.root_cause: API /api/teams/{id}/members returns {team: {...}, members: [...]} but frontend code expected array directly
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed setTeamMembers(res.data) to setTeamMembers(res.data.members || []) in Teams.js line 97
